events.title: HIRE Reentry Resource Fair
events.description: We'll be onsite; bring questions, meet partners.
events.details: Join us at the HIRE Reentry Resource Fair where we'll be connecting women with employment opportunities, resources, and community partners.
donationsNeeded: Hygiene kits (toothpaste, soap, feminine care, lotion)

events.title: She Rises Community Launch
events.description: Raffles & prizes; donations & giveaways; snacks & refreshments.
events.details: Celebrate the launch of our new community center with activities, resources, and opportunities to connect with our mission.
